label: Vesper Filament Port
description: Vesper Filament Port functions as the primary exchange station of Vesper Node, anchored directly to one of the six luminous filaments that cage the system’s sun. Its concourse is a ribbed vault of dark composite and prismatic glass, aligned to the lattice geometry so that approach lanes resolve into hard-angled corridors of radiance rather than open drift. Mooring spines extend as tensile struts into the disciplined bands of lightless interval, with berth faces cut into precise polyhedral facets. Navigation and customs infrastructure is embedded in the walls as luminous linework, rendering traffic control as a visible, geometric script across the interior surfaces.
